allow: PowerShell(wsl -e bash -c "export PATH=\\$HOME/.cargo/bin:\\$PATH && cd ~/PROJECTS/mercs_and_mines && anchor build 2>&1")
PowerShell(wsl -e bash -ic "cd ~/PROJECTS/mercs_and_mines && cat rust-toolchain.toml 2>/dev/null || cat rust-toolchain 2>/dev/null || echo 'no toolchain file'")
PowerShell(wsl -e bash -ic "cd ~/PROJECTS/mercs_and_mines/programs && rustup run solana cargo generate-lockfile 2>&1")
PowerShell(wsl -e bash -ic "cd ~/PROJECTS/mercs_and_mines/programs/mercs_and_mines && rustup run 1.89.0-sbpf-solana-v1.52 cargo build-sbf 2>&1 | head -30")
PowerShell(wsl -e bash -ic "which cargo-build-sbf 2>/dev/null || find ~/.local ~/.cargo -name cargo-build-sbf 2>/dev/null | head -5")
PowerShell(wsl -e bash -ic "rustup run solana cargo tree -p anchor-lang --version 0.30.1 2>&1 | grep 'blake3\\|cpufeatures' | head -10")
